markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on blog topics and review PMM feedback.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=114.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Blog topics will be revised** to avoid overlap with N-able's internal "Cyber Encyclopedia" by removing "what is" articles and reframing others.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - **A competitor comparison article (Topic \#3) is on hold** pending internal N-able approval, as it's a new strategy requiring leadership buy-in.
  - [**PMM feedback on drafts was minor** (stat updates, audience balance) and will be resolved, validating the AI-assisted workflow.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [**A gradual transition to a new GrowthX Engagement Manager (Matt) begins next week** to support scaling the content program.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)

## Topics

### Blog Topic Strategy

  - [**Problem:** Proposed topics overlap with N-able's internal "Cyber Encyclopedia," which already covers "what is" content.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=141.0)
  - [**Solution:** GrowthX will revise topics to focus on thought leadership and specific use cases, avoiding direct competition.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
      - **Topic \#5 ("What is threat hunting...")** → Scrapped.
      - **Topic \#1 ("SOC as a Service")** → Retained; keyword and angle will be reframed.
      - **Topic \#4 ("Immutable storage...")** → Retained; angle will be reframed to be more specific (e.g., "how it works," "benefits").
  - **Topic \#3 (Competitor Comparison)** → On hold.
      - [**Rationale:** This is a new strategy for N-able and requires internal approval from the blog owner and leadership.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=619.0)

### PMM Feedback & Process Refinements

  - [**Feedback:** The first draft review was successful, requiring only minor adjustments.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [**Stat Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [`360 billion` security events → `461` billion](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [`9 million` endpoints → `11+` million](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
      - [`99.9% reliability` stat → Removed from the feature matrix.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)
  - [**Content Angle:**](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [**Automation:** Content over-indexed on scripts. → Writing guidelines will be updated to cover the full range of automation benefits.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [**Audience:** Content skewed heavily toward MSPs. → Future assignments will be balanced to include internal IT teams.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=973.0)
  - [**Process Updates:**](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)
      - [**Image Sizing:** All images must be delivered at `1280x720` resolution to meet N-able's blog requirements.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [**Workflow:** New automations are live. When drafts move to "Editorial Review," all stakeholders will receive an email notification.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=1063.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**GrowthX:**](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [Revise blog topics to align with the new strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=480.0)
      - [Resolve PMM feedback on current drafts and move to "Editorial Review."](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=1053.0)
      - [Update writing guidelines to broaden the "automation" definition.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=829.0)
      - [Deliver all future images at `1280x720` resolution.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=1101.0)
      - [Introduce Matt (Engagement Manager) on next week's call.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=1172.0)
  - [**N-able:**](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
      - Decide internally on the competitor comparison article (Topic \#3).
      - [Consider engaging GrowthX to assist with the "Cyber Encyclopedia" content.](https://fathom.video/share/qyKHrqEv3HQazvxnvmVgSmofp6zjWvto?tab=summary&timestamp=427.0)
